greetingscustom.evening: The world quiets, but the thread remains.

quotes.userlist:
From "Pharloom's Folly" by the Conductor Romino, They see your beauty, so frail and fine,
They see your peace, woven of faith and toil,
They forget your heart, bound in slumber and servitude,
When you wake they shall see your truth,
A beast's nature bare to all.,
From "Elegy for Hallownest" by Monomon the Teacher, In wilds beyond they speak your name with reverence and regret,
For none could tame our savage souls yet you the challenge met,
Under palest watch, you taught, we changed, base instincts were redeemed,
A world you gave to bug and beast as they had never dreamed.
